title: Permission profile
description: Formal shape of a permission-profile YAML — a named, selectable bundle of permission posture + a layered per-agent grant-source (per ADR-005 / COR-028). One profile is active per project (`active_profile` in permission-config); applying it sets posture and layers its grants UNDER the adopter's own grants.yaml (never replacing them — the model unions guardrail denies + profile grants + adopter grants, adopter last). Confinement (sandbox) is referenced in a profile's prose, not written by the minimal profile (ADR-005 defers the sandbox writer). Document-shaped: the file IS the resource; the profile's name is its filename. Companion per COR-018 / the .pkit/schemas/ area conventions.

description.description: One-line, human-readable summary of the autonomy level this profile grants.

posture.description: The posture this profile sets when applied (per permission-config). Absent = leave posture unchanged.

grants.description: The per-agent intent grants this profile layers — unioned BETWEEN the catalog guardrail denies and the adopter's own grants.yaml (adopter last; manual grants are never overwritten). Empty is valid (a posture-only profile).

recommended_accommodations.description: Confinement toolkits this profile RECOMMENDS (per ADR-008) — a documentation hint surfaced by `profile show` and seeded into permission-config by `setup autonomy` on first run. NEVER written by `profile activate` (which stays nudge-only and writes no sandbox state); the authoritative list is permission-config.confinement_accommodations. Narrowing-only by convention — a profile never recommends a boundary-widening allowance.
